landing.title: 🌿 Botanical Weekly Fortune
landing.subtitle: Analyze your weekly luck and lucky numbers based on your birth date.
landing.saju_dna_desc: We convert your birth info into traditional Saju pillars (8 characters) to generate your unique energetic blueprint.
landing.rule_5plus1_desc: We combine 5 lifelong numbers from your Five Elements (Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, Water) with 1 variable number for this week.
landing.report_desc: Beyond just numbers, we calculate your wealth, love, and health scores to guide your week.
landing.quote: "Saju is your roots; fortune is the wind you meet. We calculate the perfect meeting point of both."

result.wood_desc: Energy for new beginnings and growth
result.lotto_recommend_desc: A single set of numbers extracted based on your Saju and this week's luck.
